segment.source: Renders a centered page opener with a slim announcement strip (short text, optionally linked) above the headline, subheadline, and up to two CTA buttons. Use it for: openers where a fresh news item precedes the pitch — product launches, release notes ('New in 2.0'), funding or event news atop a landing page. Prefer 'Announcement Bar' for a standalone site-wide strip; plain 'Hero Section' when there is no timely message.
